steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The first sentence states a general aerodynamic principle: sleek vehicles outperform bulky ones. The second sentence introduces the F-4 Phantom as a specific aircraft with a particular design feature. The blank must bridge a general claim to a concrete illustration of it.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — however,: signals a contradiction or contrast. The F-4 Phantom's design supports the principle rather than contradicting it. ✗
  • Choice B — meanwhile,: implies two things happening at the same time. There is no simultaneous action here. ✗
  • Choice C — for example,: introduces a specific case that illustrates the preceding general statement. The F-4 Phantom serves exactly that role. ✓
  • Choice D — additionally,: adds a second separate point. The F-4 is not an additional point; it is an example of the first point. ✗
That is the correct answer.
